channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 3 com severidade Alta
• 8 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-42298 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
Postiz is an AI social media scheduling tool. Prior to commit da44801, a "Pwn Request" vulnerability in the Build and Publish PR Docker Image workflow (.github/workflows/pr-docker-build.yml) allows any unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary code during the Docker build process and exfiltrate a highly privileged GITHUB_TOKEN (write-all permissions). This can be achieved simply by opening a Pull Request from a fork...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42298
 
📰 Introducing VMmark 4.1: Enhanced Power Efficiency Benchmarking for Private Cloud Infrastructure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 4.1
Resumo:
VMware VMmark 4.1 builds upon the solid foundation of VMmark 4.0, introducing a significant new capability that addresses one of today’s most critical data center concerns: energy efficiency. As organizations worldwide prioritize sustainable IT operations and seek to reduce their power consumption, this release delivers essential tools for measuring and comparing the power efficiency of …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/07/introducing-vmmark-4-1-enhanced-power-efficiency-benchmarking-for-private-cloud-infrastructure/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 cPanel, WHM Release Fixes for Three New Vulnerabilities — Patch Now
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
cPanel has released updates to address three vulnerabilities in cPanel and Web Host Manager (WHM) that could be exploited to achieve privilege escalation, code execution, and denial-of-service. The list of vulnerabilities is as follows - CVE-2026-29201 (CVSS score: 4.3) - An insufficient input validation of the feature file name in the "feature::LOADFEATUREFILE" adminbin call that could result
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/cpanel-whm-patch-3-new-vulnerabilities.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-4935 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
The OttoKit: All-in-One Automation Platform WordPress plugin before 1.1.23 does not properly sanitize user input before using it in a SQL statement, which could allow unauthenticated attackers to perform SQL injection attacks.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4935
 
🚨 CVE-2026-32207 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') in Azure Machine Learning allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32207
 
🚨 Dirty Frag (CVE-2026-43284) Linux Privilege Escalation - wiz.io
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-43284 associada a Ubuntu. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilwFBVV95cUxQZnNfUmlSbWFSUV80a1FSNUJ3bzNXdHV4VE43SXlmRktaTG5iSWxCT04xZXAxWGF1eHhjbVJDZWpLWXdXOVRQVUdNUVg3T0pPSVlXaWZCUHl4eGYzVlpvVzFzb2lsV1FITHFfRGJQRHVIOUhaMmwycTFmdkp1UzJiNjhEN052ZXI3OXZJTy1VWlBCd183MmdR?oc=5
 
🚨 USN-8248-2: NASM regression
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
Unfortunately the update introduced a regression which could cause NASM to crash. This update fixes the problem by reverting the fix for CVE-2021-33450 and CVE-2021-33452 in Ubuntu 24.04 LTS. Original advisory details: Daisy Chen discovered that NASM was vulnerable to a heap buffer overflow when handling certain input. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause NASM to crash, resulting in a denial of service,...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8248-2
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 07/05/2026 até 09/05/2026.
